parameters: \smirnoffDid I not say to return at 8:00 in the morning? No need
to be impatient... just be in this room at 8:00!
\smirnoffYou're back! So what, you've actually done it?
\smirnoffThree Sealed Writs, addressed from the Mayor
of Greenfield, the Village Chief of Solus Valley,
and the Town Master of Bladesville... let's
\smirnoffThey... look real. Most impressive... either you really
are worthy, or Southern Telluria has lost its mind.
\smirnoffEither way, I am a man of my word. The ceremony will begin
tomorrow at 8:00, bright and early in the morning. Be in this
room a few minutes early! I will summon for the 3 leaders to
attend, so you'd best not be tardy!
\smirnoff'Till then... rest. Prepare yourselves. A Tellurian knight
must be at their best when standing before authority...
\solYou may pass through to Telluria Field.
\solBaron Smirnoff told us to watch for you. You're allowed
in the garrison, but you can't go to Telluria Field!
\smirnoffYou made it! Let the ceremony begin!
\smirnoffLooks like the leaders are a bit late...
\smirnoffYou stand before Baron Smirnoff, commander of the
Northern Desert Garrison by will of Telluria Castle.
\smirnoffThree writs lie before me, each bearing the
seal of a leader from Southern Telluria.
\smirnoffUnderstand this clearly. Knighthood is not a reward.
It is a burden, one enforced by obedience to the crown.
\smirnoffBefore I bind you to Tellurian law...
\smirnoff...I must be certain you understand your place within it.
and drawn the attention of many.
\smirnoffThat kind of confidence... must be corrected.
\smirnoffDraw your weapon, \N[1]! Face me as your final trial,
to prove you truly are worthy of knighthood!
\smirnoff\N[1]... I proclaim you... a Tellurian knight.
Since he has the highest title in \N[19]
by at least 2 ranks, the rest of your party
\smirnoffYou may keep... my spear... you've earned it...
\p4\lsoff\}(Yeah, we'll keep your snacks too, fatass!)\lson
\mayorSince the show is over... we may as
well go back to our towns.
\mastThough we missed the ceremony, that was a great fight!
\chiefThank you again to you four for all you've done
for Southern Telluria! Stay safe in Telluria Field!
